query: review my staged diff for bugs and security issues
run a deep code review on my branch against main
rationale: direct: deep effort plus commit range

query: review interactively — ask me scope and effort first
is this diff ready to merge
post my review findings on GitHub with gh api

draft a conventional commit for staged changes

rationale: validation positive: unstaged scope with multi-lens review
